property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\Caio\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Caio\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Caio\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm 2024.3.5\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3\bin;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
14:09:10.773 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [br.com.ebac.modulo54.Modulo54ApplicationTests]: Modulo54ApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:09:10.850 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration br.com.ebac.modulo54.Modulo54Application for test class br.com.ebac.modulo54.Modulo54ApplicationTests 14:09:10.911 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [br.com.ebac.modulo54.Modulo54ApplicationTests]: Modulo54ApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:09:10.913 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration br.com.ebac.modulo54.Modulo54Application for test class br.com.ebac.modulo54.Modulo54ApplicationTests
